required_contains.text: value: Staking-related extrinsics such as add_stake and remove_stake
This error is a global account-existence check. The chain does not recognize the targeted hotkey as
an existing owned account, so the call stops with `HotKeyAccountNotExists`
For debugging, treat this as a missing hotkey account, not as proof that the hotkey lacks a UID on a

forbidden_contains.text: value: add-stake and unstake validation paths
This error is an account-existence check. Before staking helpers continue with balance, stake, or
swap validation, the runtime verifies that the targeted hotkey already exists in chain state. If no
owner association is recorded for that hotkey, the call stops with `HotKeyAccountNotExists`
